name: Chinese: Cold Shredded Vegetables with Chicke
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Dressing: In a mixing bowl, mix mustard and sugar. Gradually add thin soy sauce, blending to avoid lumps. Squeeze juice from peeled ginger root using a garlic press. Squeeze juice from tomatoes. Add remaining sauce ingredients; stir well and set aside.
2. Prepare salad: Soak wood ear fungus in 3 cups warm water for 1 hour. Beat egg and fry a thin omelet in a large skillet greased with peanut oil. Fry both sides gently and set aside to cool. Trim leeks, green onions, zucchini, carrots, and white radish. Cut ends off cucumbers but do not peel. Peel carrots and radish. Shred vegetables using a shredder or cleaver. Wash tomatoes and cut each into eighths. Shred chicken with fingers. Thinly slice omelet into strips. Drain fungus after soaking in boiling water, remove the hard center, and cut floppy ears into thin strips.
3. Finish: Layer shredded vegetables in the center of the serving plate, mounding slightly as you build layers of cucumber, carrot, chicken, fungus, zucchini, egg, leeks, radish, green onion, etc., ending with cucumber. Arrange tomato wedges around the outer edge. From the center of the vegetable mound, arrange egg strips like spokes of a wheel. Pour dressing over the vegetables and serve.
